title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a memory layer that exists outside individual AI tools, enabling persistent context and memories across different AI agents and providers. The service encrypts memories, ties them to user-owned keys, and allows selective access control between agents.
